description: Production logs for Adobe Campaign including email deliveries, bounces, tracking, and workflows. Primary data comes from Momentum MTA (eventlog_momentum) and Campaign application logs.

sourcetypes.name: eventlog_momentum
sourcetypes.description: Momentum MTA event logs - primary source for delivery, bounce, and failure data

sourcetypes.name: mta_log
sourcetypes.description: Campaign MTA process logs - delivery scheduling and SMTP operations

sourcetypes.name: runwf_log
sourcetypes.description: Workflow execution logs - workflow state, errors, and processing

sourcetypes.name: inmail_log
sourcetypes.description: Incoming mail processing - bounce rule matching and quarantine

sourcetypes.name: webmdl_log
sourcetypes.description: Web module logs - tracking, redirects, mirror pages

sourcetypes.name: pipelined_log
sourcetypes.description: Pipeline processing logs - data imports and exports

sourcetypes.name: mtachild_log
sourcetypes.description: MTA child process logs - individual delivery threads

sourcetypes.name: sms_log
sourcetypes.description: SMS delivery logs - SMPP protocol status receipts and delivery tracking

sourcetypes.name: tracking_log
sourcetypes.description: Tracking and pipeline logs - data pipeline status and file operations

sourcetypes.name: messagecenterd_log
sourcetypes.description: Message Center daemon logs - transactional delivery preparation, typology rules, recipient segmentation

sourcetypes.name: web_log
sourcetypes.description: Web module HTTP request logs - landing pages, forms, API calls, profile operations

sourcetypes.name: logins_log
sourcetypes.description: Authentication logs - Campaign console and API login attempts with success/failure status

sourcetypes.name: wfserver_log
sourcetypes.description: Workflow server process logs - workflow instance management, database operations, process creation

sourcetypes.name: javascript_log
sourcetypes.description: JavaScript engine logs - application server initialization, version info, monitoring hooks

sourcetypes.name: interactiond_log
sourcetypes.description: Interaction server logs - offer proposition management, status updates, personalization engine

sourcetypes.name: nlserver_log
sourcetypes.description: Core nlserver process logs - application server startup, version info, syntax errors (BAS-010058), parameter validation

sourcetypes.name: jobworker_log
sourcetypes.description: Job worker process logs - delivery job execution, cache management, database connection pool status

sourcetypes.name: mainlog.ec
sourcetypes.description: ESP/Momentum main delivery log - primary email transmission records with delivery/tempfail/bounce status

sourcetypes.name: bouncelog
sourcetypes.description: ESP/Momentum bounce log - bounce classification with delivery failure reasons (OverQuotaTemp, NoMX, NoSuchUser)

sourcetypes.name: access_combined
sourcetypes.description: Apache combined access logs - HTTP requests to Campaign web tier (ELB health checks, API calls, tracking pixels)

sourcetypes.name: access_combined_wcookie
sourcetypes.description: Apache access logs with TLS/cookie details - includes SSL version, cipher suite, and session info

sourcetypes.name: monitor_log
sourcetypes.description: Campaign monitor process logs - application server health monitoring and version info

sourcetypes.name: pdump_log
sourcetypes.description: Process dump logs - diagnostic dumps, application version info, and memory diagnostics

sourcetypes.name: watchdog_log
sourcetypes.description: Watchdog service logs - process launching/monitoring, task spawning (pipelined, mta, wfserver)

sourcetypes.name: archiving_log
sourcetypes.description: Email archiving logs - sent email archival to SFTP with ARC-NNNNNN status codes

sourcetypes.name: esp_historical
sourcetypes.description: ESP/Druid historical node logs - data segment management, ZooKeeper coordination for reporting

sourcetypes.name: apache_error
sourcetypes.description: Apache error logs - HTTP errors, invalid URIs (AH10244), module failures

sourcetypes.name: paniclog
sourcetypes.description: ESP/Momentum panic logs - binding group errors, configuration issues, crash diagnostics

sourcetypes.name: weblog
sourcetypes.description: Campaign web server logs (alternative to web_log) - data source errors (XSV-350063), DNS alias issues

sourcetypes.name: nssproxy_log
sourcetypes.description: NSS proxy logs - TLS handshake errors, certificate validation, proxy authentication

sourcetypes.name: stat_log
sourcetypes.description: Campaign statistics server logs - inter-server ping monitoring, version info, stat server health checks

sourcetypes.name: job_log
sourcetypes.description: Job execution logs - schema replication, external account sync, data transfer operations

sourcetypes.name: zerocrash
sourcetypes.description: Crash diagnostics - GDB stack traces, memory dumps, thread debugging for nlserver crashes

sourcetypes.name: rejectlog
sourcetypes.description: ESP/Momentum reject log - messages rejected during SMTP transaction, policy violations

field_categories.description: Core delivery and bounce data from Momentum MTA. These are the PRIMARY fields for analyzing email delivery success/failure.

fields.name: msys.message_event.type
fields.description: Event type indicating delivery outcome. Primary values are delivery, reception, inband, tempfail.

values.reception: Message received by Momentum for processing
values.inband: Permanent bounce - hard failure during SMTP conversation (hard bounce)
values.tempfail: Temporary failure - will be retried (soft bounce)

fields.name: msys.message_event.bounce_class
fields.description: Bounce classification code indicating failure type

values.10: Invalid Recipient - user does not exist
values.21: Bad Domain - no MX or A record for domain
values.22: Bad Mailbox - mailbox does not exist
values.50: Mail Block - blocked by receiving server
values.52: Spam Content - content flagged as spam

fields.name: msys.message_event.error_code
fields.description: SMTP error code from receiving server

values.421: Service not available - try again later
values.454: TLS not available / No MX for domain

fields.name: msys.message_event.reason
examples: 550 5.1.1 ...@... Recipient address rejected: ... in virtual alias table
454 4.4.4 [internal] no MX or A for domain

fields.name: msys.message_event.raw_reason
fields.description: Full original bounce message from receiving server
examples: 454 4.4.4 [internal] no MX or A for domain

fields.name: msys.message_event.binding
fields.description: Sending IP binding used for delivery

fields.name: msys.message_event.binding_group
fields.description: Binding group for IP pool management

fields.name: msys.message_event.ip_address
fields.description: IP address of receiving mail server

fields.name: msys.message_event.node_name
fields.description: Momentum MTA node that processed the message

fields.name: msys.message_event.conn_stage
fields.description: SMTP connection stage when event occurred

fields.name: msys.message_event.next_attempt
fields.description: Unix timestamp of next delivery retry

field_categories.description: Custom metadata attached to messages by Campaign
Custom Campaign metadata added to Momentum events

fields.name: cust.InstanceName
fields.description: Campaign instance name - THE PRIMARY FIELD for filtering eventlog_momentum by customer/instance. Uses UNDERSCORES as separator (e.g., southwest_airlines_mkt_prod18, NOT southwest-airlines-mkt-prod18). When user mentions an instance with dashes, convert to underscores. This is the ONLY way to filter deliveries/bounces by Campaign instance in eventlog_momentum. DO NOT use host for instance filtering - host is the Momentum MTA server.

field_categories.description: Fields from Campaign MTA logs (mta_log sourcetype)

fields.name: message
examples: New attempt to establish SMPP connection

field_categories.description: Fields from workflow execution logs (runwf_log sourcetype)

fields.name: nextWorkflowInfo
fields.description: JSON with next workflow execution details

field_categories.description: Fields from bounce processing logs (inmail_log sourcetype)
Standard fields present across all sourcetypes

fields.name: host
fields.description: Hostname of the server generating the log. IMPORTANT: For eventlog_momentum, host is the Momentum MTA server (e.g., momentum08.sin2.cpt.adobe.net), NOT the Campaign instance! To filter eventlog_momentum by Campaign instance (like 'southwest_airlines_mkt_prod18'), you MUST use cust.InstanceName instead of host. For Campaign application logs (mta_log, runwf_log, etc.), host IS the Campaign server (e.g., singapo-mkt-prod2-1).

field_categories.description: Fields for SMS delivery tracking via SMPP protocol (sms_log and mta_log sourcetypes)

fields.name: SR
fields.description: Status Receipt from SMPP provider. Contains delivery status in format: id:xxx sub:xxx dlvrd:xxx submit date:xxx done date:xxx stat:xxx err:xxx. stat values: DELIVRD (delivered), UNDELIV (undeliverable), EXPIRED, REJECTED
examples: id:1740812925256376 sub:000 dlvrd:001 submit date:2512092048 done date:2512092048 stat:DELIVRD err:000

fields.name: command_status
fields.description: SMPP command status code. 0x00000000 = success, other values indicate errors

fields.name: dest_addr
fields.description: Destination address/phone number or short code name

field_categories.description: Fields from web module logs for tracking pixels, redirects, and mirror pages (webmdl_log sourcetype)

fields.name: code
fields.description: HTTP status code returned by web module

field_categories.description: Fields from tracking and pipeline logs (tracking_log sourcetype)

fields.name: login
fields.description: User login associated with the operation

field_categories.description: AWS instance metadata (present on cloud-hosted instances)
Fields from Message Center daemon logs (messagecenterd_log sourcetype) - transactional email processing

fields.name: utm_campaign
fields.description: UTM campaign parameter from tracking URLs

fields.name: utm_content
fields.description: UTM content parameter for A/B testing

field_categories.description: Fields from login/authentication logs (logins_log sourcetype)

fields.name: login
fields.description: Username or service account attempting authentication

values.FAILED: Authentication failed - invalid credentials or permission denied

fields.name: server
fields.description: Server or service name for authentication context

field_categories.description: Fields from workflow server logs (wfserver_log sourcetype) - process management

fields.name: pid
fields.description: Process ID of the workflow execution

fields.name: wdbc
fields.description: Database connection log type for SQL operations

field_categories.description: Fields from interaction/offer engine logs (interactiond_log sourcetype)

fields.name: propositionId
fields.description: ID of the offer proposition being processed

field_categories.description: Fields from core nlserver process logs (nlserver_log sourcetype)

fields.name: field3
fields.description: Numeric field in nlserver log format (usually 1)

field_categories.description: Fields from job worker logs (jobworker_log sourcetype) - delivery job execution

fields.name: IPAffinity
fields.description: IP affinity group for delivery routing

fields.name: deliveryId
fields.description: Delivery ID being processed by job worker

field_categories.description: Fields from Apache access logs (access_combined, access_combined_wcookie) - HTTP request tracking

fields.name: clientip
fields.description: Client IP address making the request (may be load balancer IP)

field_categories.description: Fields from watchdog_log and monitor_log - process management and health monitoring

fields.name: task
fields.description: Task name being launched or monitored

fields.name: command
fields.description: Full command line for task execution

field_categories.description: Fields from archiving_log - email archival operations
Fields from apache_error logs - HTTP server errors

fields.name: client
fields.description: Client IP and port causing the error

field_categories.description: Fields from ESP/Momentum mainlog.ec and bouncelog sourcetypes - raw MTA delivery records

fields.name: p
fields.description: Bounce/delivery policy classification in Momentum logs

values.OverQuotaTemp: Temporary over-quota bounce - mailbox full, will retry
values.OverQuotaPerm: Permanent over-quota bounce - mailbox full, no retry
values.NoSuchUser: User does not exist at destination

fields.name: ID
fields.description: Unique message/transaction ID in Momentum format (hex)

query_patterns.use_case: Calculate delivery success rate for a time period
query_patterns.spl_template: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.type | eventstats sum(count) as total | eval percentage=round(count/total*100,2) | table msys.message_event.type count percentage
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find which domains have the most bounces
query_patterns.spl_template: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.routing_domain | sort -count | head 20
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.reason | sort -count | head 20
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by cust.customerID msys.message_event.type | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by cust.InstanceName msys.message_event.type | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="inband" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.reason | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="tempfail" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find bounces for a specific Campaign instance. Use cust.InstanceName with UNDERSCORES (e.g., virginatlantic_mkt_prod1, NOT virginatlantic-mkt-prod1). Supports wildcards like virginatlantic_mkt_prod*
query_patterns.spl_template: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName={instance_pattern} msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.type msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find deliveries for a specific Campaign instance. Use cust.InstanceName with UNDERSCORES (e.g., virginatlantic_mkt_prod1). Supports wildcards.
query_patterns.spl_template: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName={instance_pattern} msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest={time_range} | stats count by cust.DeliveryInternalName | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.bounce_class="10" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.routing_domain | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest={time_range} | timechart span=1h count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=runwf_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=runwf_log failed=1 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host internalName | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Analyze quarantine reasons from inmail processing
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=inmail_log iQuarantineReason=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by mQuarantineText | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find deliveries for a specific customer
query_patterns.spl_template: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.customerID="*{customer_name}*" earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.type cust.DeliveryInternalName | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.error_code=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.error_code | sort -count
index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum earliest={time_range} | stats count by msys.message_event.node_name msys.message_event.type | sort -count

index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest={time_range} | stats avg(msys.message_event.queue_time) as avg_queue_ms by cust.InstanceName | eval avg_queue_sec=round(avg_queue_ms/1000,2) | sort -avg_queue_sec

index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum msys.message_event.num_retries>0 earliest={time_range} | stats count avg(msys.message_event.num_retries) as avg_retries by msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find all events for a specific Campaign instance
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod cust.InstanceName="{instance_name}" earliest={time_range} | stats count by sourcetype msys.message_event.type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find HTTP errors (404, 500, etc.) from web tracking, redirects, or mirror pages
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=webmdl_log host={host_pattern} earliest={time_range} | search message="*404*" OR message="*500*" OR iRc<0 | stats count by iRc message | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find web module errors for tracking pixels, redirects, mirror pages
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=webmdl_log iRc<0 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host uri iRc | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=sms_log SR=* earliest={time_range} | rex field=SR "stat:(?<sms_status>\w+)" | stats count by host sms_status | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=sms_log SR=*UNDELIV* OR SR=*EXPIRED* OR SR=*REJECTED* earliest={time_range} | stats count by host SR | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=sms_log dest_addr=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by dest_addr | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=tracking_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Find file operation errors in tracking (iRc=-52 is common)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=tracking_log iRc<0 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host iRc message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: MTA child process status and errors
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mtachild_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mtachild_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=pipelined_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find Message Center transactional delivery errors
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=messagecenterd_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Monitor typology rule processing for transactional messages
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=messagecenterd_log "typology" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=logins_log FAILED earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Calculate login success vs failure rate
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=logins_log earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "(?<auth_status>FAILED|SUCCESS)" | stats count by auth_status | eventstats sum(count) as total | eval pct=round(count/total*100,2)
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=web_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host iRc message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Track profile operations (subscriptions, updates) via web forms
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=web_log iStatus=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by host iStatus | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=wfserver_log "Created process" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=wfserver_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=javascript_log "Application server for Adobe Campaign" earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=interactiond_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Find offer proposition status update failures
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=interactiond_log "proposition" message_type=warning OR message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=nlserver_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Check Adobe Campaign application server versions from nlserver
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=nlserver_log "Application server for Adobe Campaign" earliest={time_range} | dedup host | table host message

query_patterns.use_case: Monitor job worker activity and status
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=jobworker_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=jobworker_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=jobworker_log WEB-530037 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mainlog.ec earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find ESP/Momentum temporary delivery failures (quota, rate limiting)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mainlog.ec p=OverQuotaTemp OR p=ReceivingRate earliest={time_range} | stats count by host p | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=bouncelog earliest={time_range} | stats count by host p | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=bouncelog p=OverQuotaPerm OR p=NoSuchUser earliest={time_range} | stats count by host p | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: ESP bounce analysis by receiving domain (extract from raw)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=bouncelog earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "@(?<recipient_domain>[^@]+)@" | stats count by recipient_domain | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: HTTP response status distribution from Apache access logs
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie earliest={time_range} | stats count by status | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Find HTTP 4xx and 5xx errors in Apache access logs
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie status>=400 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host status request | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie earliest={time_range} | rex field=request "\w+ (?<uri>[^ ]+)" | stats count by uri | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=apache_error earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "\[(?<error_code>AH\d+)\]" | stats count by host error_code | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Find invalid URI errors (AH10244) in Apache
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=apache_error AH10244 earliest={time_range} | stats count by host client | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Campaign monitor process status and version info
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=monitor_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Track process launches by watchdog service
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=watchdog_log "Launching task" earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "Launching task '(?<task>[^']+)'" | stats count by host task | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=archiving_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=archiving_log message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: ESP/Momentum panic log errors (binding group issues)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=paniclog earliest={time_range} | rex field=_raw "(?<function>[^:]+):" | stats count by host function | sort -count | head 20

query_patterns.use_case: Campaign weblog errors (data source, DNS alias issues)
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=weblog message_type=error earliest={time_range} | stats count by host iRc message | sort -count | head 20
index=campaign_prod sourcetype=nssproxy_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: TLS protocol version distribution from HTTPS requests
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie ssl_protocol=* earliest={time_range} | stats count by ssl_protocol | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Process dump diagnostics and version info
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=pdump_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: ESP/Druid historical segment management and ZooKeeper coordination
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=esp_historical earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Statistics server ping monitoring and inter-server health checks
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=stat_log earliest={time_range} | search "Pinging stat server" | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Schema replication and external account sync job monitoring
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=job_log earliest={time_range} | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: Application crash analysis with GDB stack traces
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=zerocrash earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

query_patterns.use_case: ESP/Momentum rejected messages during SMTP transaction
query_patterns.spl_template: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=rejectlog earliest={time_range} | stats count by host | sort -count

1.name: Undetermined
1.description: Bounce reason could not be determined

21.name: Bad Domain
21.description: No MX or A record for domain

51.name: Spam Related
51.description: Blocked as spam by receiving server

delivery.description: Message successfully delivered to recipient MTA

reception.description: Message received by Momentum for processing

inband.description: Permanent bounce during SMTP conversation (hard bounce)

tempfail.description: Temporary failure, message will be retried (soft bounce)

irc_code_reference.description: Common iRc (internal return code) values across Campaign logs. Negative values indicate errors.

-53.name: General Error
-53.description: Generic error condition, check message for details

16384.name: Invalid/Not Found
16384.description: Resource not found or invalid parameter

-52.name: File/Permission Error
-52.description: Cannot read/write file or create directory

error_code_reference.description: Common Campaign error codes (format: XXX-NNNNNN). Search with: message_type=error | rex field=_raw "(?<error_code>[A-Z]{2,4}-\d{6})"

XTK-170036.description: Unable to parse expression - invalid schema path or attribute

use_cases.question: What are the bounces for a specific instance like virginatlantic?
use_cases.description: Find hard and soft bounces for a specific Campaign instance. Use cust.InstanceName with UNDERSCORES (e.g., virginatlantic_mkt_prod* not virginatlantic-mkt-prod*). The host field is NOT the instance - it's the Momentum server.
use_cases.spl_example: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName=virginatlantic_mkt_prod* msys.message_event.type IN ("inband", "tempfail") earliest=-1h | stats count by msys.message_event.bounce_class msys.message_event.type msys.message_event.reason | sort -count

use_cases.question: How many emails were delivered for southwest-airlines or any specific customer instance?
use_cases.description: Count deliveries for a Campaign instance. CRITICAL: Use cust.InstanceName NOT host! Convert dashes to underscores (southwest-airlines-mkt-prod18 becomes southwest_airlines_mkt_prod18). host field contains Momentum MTA servers, not Campaign instances.
use_cases.spl_example: index=momentum_prod sourcetype=eventlog_momentum cust.InstanceName=southwest_airlines_mkt_prod* msys.message_event.type="delivery" earliest=-1d | stats count as delivered_emails

use_cases.question: What SMPP/SMS errors are happening?
use_cases.description: Find SMS delivery failures via SMPP protocol
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mta_log OR sourcetype=sms_log message_type=error SMP-* earliest=-1h | stats count by host message | head 20

use_cases.question: Why are workflows failing?
use_cases.description: Find workflow execution errors (XTK, WKF errors)
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=runwf_log message_type=error earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "(?<error_code>[A-Z]{2,4}-\d{6})" | stats count by host error_code | sort -count

use_cases.question: What HTTP errors are occurring on tracking/redirects?
use_cases.description: Find web module HTTP errors (404, 500, redirect failures)
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=webmdl_log message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host iRc message | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: Are there file/disk errors?
use_cases.description: Find file system errors (BAS-010001, BAS-010018, iRc=-52)
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod iRc=-52 earliest=-1h | stats count by host sourcetype message | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What JavaScript errors are happening in deliveries?
use_cases.description: Find JavaScript execution errors in delivery content
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod message_type=error JST-310000 earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count

use_cases.question: Show me SSL/certificate errors
use_cases.description: Find SSL/TLS certificate verification failures
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod message_type=error (IOB-090020 OR iRc=-69) earliest=-1h | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What are the most common errors right now?
use_cases.description: Top error codes across all Campaign logs
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod message_type=error earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "(?<error_code>[A-Z]{2,4}-\d{6})" | stats count by error_code | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: Which hosts have the most errors?
use_cases.description: Find hosts with highest error rates
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: Are there login failures?
use_cases.description: Find failed authentication attempts to Campaign console or API
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=logins_log FAILED earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What's happening with transactional emails?
use_cases.description: Check Message Center daemon for transactional delivery processing
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=messagecenterd_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

use_cases.question: Are web forms/landing pages working?
use_cases.description: Check web module for landing page and form errors
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=web_log message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host iRc | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What Campaign versions are running?
use_cases.description: Check application server versions across instances
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=javascript_log "Application server for Adobe Campaign" earliest=-24h | dedup host | table host message

use_cases.question: Are offers/interactions working?
use_cases.description: Check interaction server for offer proposition errors
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=interactiond_log message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What nlserver errors are happening?
use_cases.description: Find core nlserver process errors (syntax errors, parameter validation)
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=nlserver_log message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host message | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: Are job workers running properly?
use_cases.description: Check job worker status, cache purging, and delivery job execution
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=jobworker_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

use_cases.question: What's happening with ESP/Momentum deliveries?
use_cases.description: Check mainlog.ec for ESP delivery status and temporary failures
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=mainlog.ec earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count

use_cases.question: What ESP bounces are occurring?
use_cases.description: Analyze ESP/Momentum bounces by classification (OverQuotaTemp, NoSuchUser, etc.)
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=bouncelog earliest=-1h | stats count by host p | sort -count

use_cases.question: Which domains have the most ESP bounces?
use_cases.description: Find receiving domains with highest bounce rates in ESP/Momentum logs
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=bouncelog earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "@(?<recipient_domain>[^@]+)@" | stats count by recipient_domain | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What HTTP errors are happening in Apache?
use_cases.description: Find 4xx and 5xx HTTP errors from Apache access logs
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined OR sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie status>=400 earliest=-1h | stats count by host status | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: Are there invalid URL errors?
use_cases.description: Find Apache AH10244 invalid URI path errors
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=apache_error AH10244 earliest=-1h | stats count by host client | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What TLS versions are clients using?
use_cases.description: Check SSL/TLS protocol distribution from HTTPS requests
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=access_combined_wcookie ssl_protocol=* earliest=-1h | stats count by ssl_protocol | sort -count

use_cases.question: Are processes being launched correctly?
use_cases.description: Check watchdog service for process launches (pipelined, mta, wfserver)
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=watchdog_log "Launching task" earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "Launching task '(?<task>[^']+)'" | stats count by host task | sort -count

use_cases.question: Is email archiving working?
use_cases.description: Check archiving_log for email archival success/failure
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=archiving_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

use_cases.question: Are there ESP panic/crash errors?
use_cases.description: Check paniclog for ESP/Momentum binding group errors and crashes
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=paniclog earliest=-1h | rex field=_raw "(?<function>[^:]+):" | stats count by host function | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: What data source errors are happening?
use_cases.description: Find XSV-350063 data source/DNS alias errors from weblog
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=weblog message_type=error earliest=-1h | stats count by host iRc message | sort -count | head 20

use_cases.question: Are there TLS certificate errors?
use_cases.description: Check nssproxy_log for TLS handshake and certificate validation errors
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=nssproxy_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count

use_cases.question: Is the monitor process healthy?
use_cases.description: Check Campaign monitor process for health status and version info
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=monitor_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

use_cases.question: Are there process dumps or diagnostics?
use_cases.description: Check pdump_log for process dump diagnostics, version info, and memory diagnostics
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=pdump_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

use_cases.question: What's happening with ESP/Druid historical data?
use_cases.description: Check esp_historical for Druid segment management and ZooKeeper coordination status
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=esp_historical earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count

use_cases.question: Are the stat servers communicating properly?
use_cases.description: Check stat_log for inter-server ping monitoring and health checks between Campaign servers
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=stat_log earliest=-1h | search "Pinging stat server" | stats count by host | sort -count

use_cases.question: What replication jobs are running?
use_cases.description: Check job_log for schema replication, external account sync, and data transfer operations
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=job_log earliest=-1h | stats count by host message_type | sort -count

use_cases.question: Did any Campaign processes crash?
use_cases.description: Check zerocrash for GDB stack traces and crash diagnostics from nlserver crashes
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=zerocrash earliest=-24h | stats count by host | sort -count

use_cases.question: Are any messages being rejected by ESP?
use_cases.description: Check rejectlog for messages rejected during SMTP transaction by Momentum/ESP
use_cases.spl_example: index=campaign_prod sourcetype=rejectlog earliest=-1h | stats count by host | sort -count
